text:
There once was a kid named Sam who loved collecting rocks. He would wander through the forest tirelessly, picking up stones with glossy smooth sides. His favorite was a tiny pebble he once found that looked like an old silver coin. He kept them all in a worn leather pouch hismom knit him.

One day, while carrying his treasure out of the woods, Sam tripped over a root. The stash cascaded down a rocky hill. When he got up, he saw all his rocks scattered far across the field.

Panicked but determined, he searched high and low. Each rock had a story, a story behind its smooth texture, its unique shape. He picked up stones that reminded him of his mom's kind smile, others that held memories of sunny days by the lake.

After finding all his precious rocks, Sam carefully pieced them back into their perfect order. He felt stronger, more secure holding them tight. Every inch of his bag was filled with stories. That night, he dream
